---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Attachra
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and what's currently missing or getting in
your way? Prefer describing the underlying problem over a specific
solution — it's easier for us to evaluate.

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If you have a specific API/policy/config shape
in mind, sketch it here.

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds you're using today, or other approaches you considered.

## Environment (if relevant to the request)

- Attachra version / commit:
- Postfix version:
- Mail stack (e.g. Mailcow, iRedMail, Mail-in-a-Box, custom):
- Storage backend (S3 / MinIO / Ceph / filesystem):

## Additional context

Note if this touches architectural boundaries (core/adapter split,
policy format, new external dependency) — those changes go through the
ADR process described in `CONTRIBUTING.md`, so flagging it early helps.
